output.encounter_1_trigger: Reaching the thermal vent output draws out the Crab and reveals the path to the Submarine Base.
output.encounter_2_trigger: Entering the central reactor chamber activates the Eel-Bot and reveals the Boss chamber.
output.objective: Destroy the Leviathan Prime and escape the collapsing trench.
